_comment: Mutation testing for the deterministic critical modules (constant-time compare, request validation + schemas, error helper, resilience layer). Run: pnpm run test:mutation. These modules are the ones held to the 95% unit-coverage gate; mutation testing verifies the tests actually assert behavior, not just execute lines.
_mutatorComment: Excludes low-value mutants — log/response-message StringLiterals and zod schema ObjectLiteral/ArrayDeclaration shapes produce brittle survivors (you'd have to assert exact log text / every schema field boundary). We mutation-test behavior, not message wording.
